heroHeadline: Trump Announces Truce; Tehran Agrees Safe Transit Through Strait of Hormuz
heroSubtitle: Trump announces a formal truce with Iran as Tehran agrees to guarantee safe transit through the Strait of Hormuz, addressing the key energy chokepoint disrupted throughout the 40-day conflict.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
